title: Agent Profile v1.0.0
description: Capabilities, constraints, permissions, and behavioral rules for an AI agent generating constellation artifacts.

agentId.description: Unique identifier for this AI agent or tool instance (referenced by prismMeta.agentProfileId).

kind.description: Category of agent (e.g., generator, refactor, auditor, orchestrator).

tiers.description: Tiers this agent may operate in (e.g., public, vault, lab, research).

permissions.description: Fine-grained rights for clamping, migrations, and registry edits.

allowsClamp.description: If true, validator may clamp invariants/metrics on behalf of this agent.

allowsSchemaUpgrade.description: If true, agent may propose upgrades to schemaVersion fields.

allowsRegistryWrite.description: If true, agent may write or modify registry entries.

allowsPolicyEdit.description: If true, agent may edit policyEnvelope and regionContractCard caps/bounds.

allowedSchemas.description: List of schema IDs/types this agent is allowed to generate or edit (e.g., seedContractCard.v1).

rateLimits.description: Optional rate limit and scope controls.

generates.description: List of artifact types this agent can produce.

validatesSchemas.description: Whether the agent can validate outputs against JSON Schema before emitting.

queriesRegistries.description: Whether the agent can query NDJSON registries for ID resolution.

emitsTelemetry.description: Whether the agent produces telemetry envelopes during generation.

supportsBatchTransactions.description: Whether the agent can generate atomic multi-file batch manifests.

oneFilePerRequest.description: Enforces the baseline rule: one generation step produces one file.

requirePrismMeta.description: Mandates embedding prismMeta in every generated artifact.

enforceTierGating.description: Prevents generation of vault/lab content without proper deadledgerref.

maxInvariantDrift.description: Maximum allowed deviation from canonical invariant ranges.

allowedTiers.description: Tiers this agent is permitted to generate content for.

promptTemplates.description: Mapping of artifact type to documentation file with prompt examples (e.g., 'regionContractCard': 'docs/ai-chat-flows/generate-region.md').

onError.description: Recovery actions on validation failure (e.g., fallback-to-minimal, log-and-notify).
